rule: AGENCY RULE: Zero H1 tags detected. This is a critical SEO failure. The primary hero value proposition must be wrapped in an H1 immediately.
AGENCY RULE: Multiple H1 tags detected. Search engines expect exactly one H1. Consolidate to a single primary heading.
AGENCY RULE: Meta description is absent. This directly reduces click-through rate from organic search results.
AGENCY RULE: Over 50% of images lack alt text. This violates WCAG 2.1 accessibility standards and fails Google Image indexation.
AGENCY RULE: No CTAs detected. This page has no clear conversion mechanism. At minimum, one primary CTA button is required.
AGENCY RULE: Excessive CTAs detected. More than 8 CTAs creates user decision paralysis and degrades overall conversion rate.
AGENCY RULE: Thin content detected (under 300 words). Search engines classify this as low-value copy, harming organic ranking potential.
AGENCY RULE: No external links present. Outbound links to authoritative sources serve as a baseline trust signal for search engine crawlers.
